expectations.text: Case focus is explicitly covered: Google Sheets dashboard export coverage distinguishes supported formats, entry points, and output expectations
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly states the case focus and enumerates the three required distinctions: “Supported formats… Entry points… Output expectations” and reiterates that Phase 5b should enforce these distinctions (e.g., “A dedicated scenario cluster… enumerates: Supported format(s)… Entry points… Output expectations”).

expectations.text: Output aligns with primary phase phase5b
expectations.evidence: The produced outputs do not include required Phase 5b artifacts and explicitly note they are missing: execution_notes.md: “Primary blocker: No Phase 5b run artifacts were provided… missing… context/checkpoint_audit… context/checkpoint_delta… drafts/qa_plan_phase5b…”. result.md concludes “BLOCKED (insufficient run artifacts to assess Phase 5b enforcement).” This does not satisfy Phase 5b alignment/contract execution.
